data.metadata:
{"description":"Lola is a top Abstract streamer and an amazing artist. She always brings great vibes, and her smile is contagious. Always kind and positive, she also introduces her community to Web3 and Abstract through games, dApps, and her streams.

Recently reaching giga status, she has become one of the faces of the chain over the past few months. Consistent and reliable, she is fully committed and truly reflects the values of the chain.

If you’re not following her yet… there’s still time 
Sigan a mi parcerita, es una chimba 🔥"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Lola is a top Abstract streamer and an amazing artist. She always brings great vibes, and her smile is contagious. Always kind and positive, she also introduces her community to Web3 and Abstract through games, dApps, and her streams.

Recently reaching giga status, she has become one of the faces of the chain over the past few months. Consistent and reliable, she is fully committed and truly reflects the values of the chain.

If you’re not following her yet… there’s still time 
Follow my friend, she's awesome 🔥

data.metadata: {"description":"For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example."}

translation.translatedDescription: For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example.

data.metadata: {"description":"Marcello is one of the best content creators in the gaming sector. His videos bring a lot of energy and clearly explain the topic. He conveys fun and makes you want to try the product. Besides that, he’s one of the most important figures in the Abstract ecosystem and a great friend."}

translation.translatedDescription: Marcello is one of the best content creators in the gaming sector. His videos bring a lot of energy and clearly explain the topic. He conveys fun and makes you want to try the product. Besides that, he’s one of the most important figures in the Abstract ecosystem and a great friend.

data.comment: A Creative Mind Who Elevates Every Project
data.metadata: {"description":"Nix is a rare mix of artist and developer who keeps pushing creative boundaries. He brings fresh ideas, solid execution, and great energy to every project. He’s someone I genuinely look forward to collaborating with again."}

translation.translatedContent: A Creative Mind Who Elevates Every Project
translation.translatedDescription: Nix is a rare mix of artist and developer who keeps pushing creative boundaries. He brings fresh ideas, solid execution, and great energy to every project. He’s someone I genuinely look forward to collaborating with again.

data.metadata: {"description":"Met Nix through Abstract trenches originally when looking at collections to bid. Got to know him more through Xeet as we are both advisors. Good guy, good dev."}

translation.translatedDescription: Met Nix through Abstract trenches originally when looking at collections to bid. Got to know him more through Xeet as we are both advisors. Good guy, good dev.

data.metadata: {"description":"guezit0 regularly shares digests on Abstract, AI agents, and web3, structures materials, and helps newcomers politely. He relies on vetted sources, flags risks, and keeps a high bar. He knows how to connect people and he’s also an excellent Giga Chad"}

translation.translatedDescription: guezit0 regularly shares digests on Abstract, AI agents, and web3, structures materials, and helps newcomers politely. He relies on vetted sources, flags risks, and keeps a high bar. He knows how to connect people and he’s also an excellent Giga Chad

data.metadata: {"description":"He was one of the kindest people I met in the Abs Gigachad community  he always supported me, even during my rough times there. I had already left some words expressing my gratitude, and now I’m going to validate them with a monetary gesture!"}

translation.translatedDescription: He was one of the kindest people I met in the Abs Gigachad community  he always supported me, even during my rough times there. I had already left some words expressing my gratitude, and now I’m going to validate them with a monetary gesture!

I'd saw wagnet on the timeline and within abstract community for long while I personally get to witnessed as he's joining us giga this month thats when we got to talked 

from the convo we had, I could say that wagnet is one of a few who strongly represent creativity through his contents along with his vibe to enjoy abstract ecosystem 

I'm so glad we have wagnet in both abstract and pudgy penguin communities

data.metadata: {"description":"Have just recently met Wagnet but from the convos we've I can instantly tell he's a great guy, no doubt. He reps the pudgy penguin brand all over his timeline and in his own creative way. He fully embraces the pengu. Love how he shows his pengu and abster in his irl life, a true giga chad at heart. Hope we can connect more brother!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Have just recently met Wagnet but from the convos we've I can instantly tell he's a great guy, no doubt. He reps the pudgy penguin brand all over his timeline and in his own creative way. He fully embraces the pengu. Love how he shows his pengu and abster in his irl life, a true giga chad at heart. Hope we can connect more brother!

data.comment: Easily one of my favorite web3 devs
data.metadata: {"description":"Curtis is good people. Not only a talented dev, but trustworthy and honest. He doesn't leave people hanging. Always going the extra mile. Would always jump at a chance to work with him."}

translation.translatedContent: Easily one of my favorite web3 devs
translation.translatedDescription: Curtis is good people. Not only a talented dev, but trustworthy and honest. He doesn't leave people hanging. Always going the extra mile. Would always jump at a chance to work with him.

data.metadata: {"description":"L0K0 is a real OG on Abstract, he launched the first NFT collection on Abstract, during the Testnet, the collection was innovative with a new IP, is also difficult to deploy especially when you are the first to launch.\nHumanly he is a serious and professional person."}

{"description":"Il est clip plus vite que son ombre, Il est reconnu pour son talent à saisir les moments les plus importants d'un stream  et à les proposer ensuite au format clip. Il est d'ailleurs le premier à avoir obtenu le Badge en rapport à cette activité sur Abstract. \n\nIl a un talent indéniable pour cette activité, mais il ne faut tout de même pas le réduire uniquement à cette activité. Il est très impliqué dans la vie de communauté sur Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription:
He clips faster than his shadow. He is recognized for his talent in capturing the most important moments of a stream and then offering them in clip format. He is also the first to have obtained the Badge related to this activity on Abstract.

He has an undeniable talent for this activity, but he should not be reduced solely to this activity. He is very involved in community life on Abstract.

data.metadata: {"description":"Quel homme, il était Gigachad, il a perdu le rôle car il a été inactif durant une période, c'est pas pour autant qu'il a abandonné, il a mis les bouchées doubles et récupérer son rôle Gigachad. Quel ténacité, incroyable. \n\nC'est un véritable acharné qui aime vraiment ce qu'il fait, qui participe à la vie de communauté, et qui apporte sa touche personnel du brazil."}

translation.translatedDescription:
What a man, he was Gigachad, he lost the role because he was inactive for a period, but that didn't make him give up, he doubled his efforts and recovered his Gigachad role. What tenacity, incredible.

He is a real hard worker who really loves what he does, who participates in community life, and who brings his personal touch from Brazil.

data.metadata:
{"description":"Il réalise des oeuvres, qui représente des figures importantes de la culture Abstract.

Notamment il a réalisé :
-un Tapis Pudgy Penguins
- un tapis avec le logo Abstract. 

Il s'est fait remarqué grâce à son talent et ses oeuvres et aujourd'hui il est Gigachad au sein d'Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription:
He creates works that represent important figures in Abstract culture.

In particular, he has created:
-a Pudgy Penguins Rug
-a rug with the Abstract logo.

He has gained recognition thanks to his talent and his works, and today he is a Gigachad within Abstract.

data.metadata: {"description":"Wagnet is the chad i respect much, he is the first giga chad who vouched for me on ethos \n\nAppreciate you much. Hope one day we can meet irl"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Wagnet is the chad i respect much, he is the first giga chad who vouched for me on ethos 

Appreciate you much. Hope one day we can meet irl

data.metadata: {"description":"I have been following how SillyBilly drives Abstract for a long time: he brings people together, takes on complex tasks, helps newcomers and leaders, and keeps a positive tone and a high pace. His graphic updates deserve special respect: they are informative, clear, and visually understandable, they save time, get you up to speed quickly, and genuinely help you navigate the ecosystem. He is a responsive, disciplined, and very polite person, and I am very glad to meet you."}

translation.translatedDescription: I have been following how SillyBilly drives Abstract for a long time: he brings people together, takes on complex tasks, helps newcomers and leaders, and keeps a positive tone and a high pace. His graphic updates deserve special respect: they are informative, clear, and visually understandable, they save time, get you up to speed quickly, and genuinely help you navigate the ecosystem. He is a responsive, disciplined, and very polite person, and I am very glad to meet you.

data.comment: A streamer who raises the bar in Abstract
data.metadata: {"description":"GMB is one of those rare creators whose content is both genuinely useful and truly entertaining. He knows Moody Madness like his own stadium: breaks down the mechanics, shows shortcuts live, hosts his own events (Moody Mondays, tournaments), and keeps a steady streaming cadence.\nI genuinely like what he’s doing this work commands respect and admiration, with a clear focus on quality and community support."}

translation.translatedContent: A streamer who raises the bar in Abstract
translation.translatedDescription:
GMB is one of those rare creators whose content is both genuinely useful and truly entertaining. He knows Moody Madness like his own stadium: breaks down the mechanics, shows shortcuts live, hosts his own events (Moody Mondays, tournaments), and keeps a steady streaming cadence.
I genuinely like what he’s doing this work commands respect and admiration, with a clear focus on quality and community support.

data.metadata: {"description":"MIC is a rare example of someone who pushes culture forward while getting the day-to-day done. Always on the ground, he leads substantive discussions, explains complex topics clearly, and carefully onboards people from web2 to the chain. His superpower is connecting communities and people: he initiates collaborations, keeps projects updated, helps with launches, and never loses focus on quality. He’s always kind and responsive, yet disciplined and reliable—if he takes it on, he delivers and owns responsibility. I’d especially highlight his contribution to the local Vietnamese community: consistent presence, trust, and growing engagement. If you need a CM/ambassador who brings real value, boosts visibility, and builds a healthy culture, MIC is exactly that."}

translation.translatedDescription: MIC is a rare example of someone who pushes culture forward while getting the day-to-day done. Always on the ground, he leads substantive discussions, explains complex topics clearly, and carefully onboards people from web2 to the chain. His superpower is connecting communities and people: he initiates collaborations, keeps projects updated, helps with launches, and never loses focus on quality. He’s always kind and responsive, yet disciplined and reliable—if he takes it on, he delivers and owns responsibility. I’d especially highlight his contribution to the local Vietnamese community: consistent presence, trust, and growing engagement. If you need a CM/ambassador who brings real value, boosts visibility, and builds a healthy culture, MIC is exactly that.

data.metadata: {"description":"met Wagnet irl, super creative mind, full of ideas. Saw firsthand how he became a Gigachad in Abstract, using every skill he’s got! Wagnet is also an NFT genius, dude knows the space inside out, NFT brain unmatched"}

translation.translatedDescription: met Wagnet irl, super creative mind, full of ideas. Saw firsthand how he became a Gigachad in Abstract, using every skill he’s got! Wagnet is also an NFT genius, dude knows the space inside out, NFT brain unmatched

data.metadata: {"description":"Aside from just being a great guy, Nix is one of those rare devs that not only can write code but has an eye for generating beautiful art with it. Both his original collection \"Treeangles\" and his subsequent Hexagons collection are fully onchain SVGs and I absolutely love the geometric styles of his art."}

translation.translatedDescription: Aside from just being a great guy, Nix is one of those rare devs that not only can write code but has an eye for generating beautiful art with it. Both his original collection "Treeangles" and his subsequent Hexagons collection are fully onchain SVGs and I absolutely love the geometric styles of his art.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "어젯밤 정말 너무 고마운 일이 있었어요! 제가 Abstract의 수집 플랫폼 DYLI에서 너무 마음에 드는 'Fugz First Edition Hoodie'를 오퍼 가격에 걸어두고 있었어요. 그리고 까먹었죠 ㅋㅋㅋ

그런데 어제 제가 Fugz NFT를 구매한 걸 보고, AL님이 "오, 너가 Fugz 산 거 봤고 후드티 가지고 싶어 하는 것도 봤어! 그러니까 선물해 줄게!"라고 말한 뒤 정말 쿨하게 후드티 NFT를 저에게 전송해 줬어요! 저는 즉시 저의 집으로 배송을 시켰습니다. 정말 감동받았어요.

Pudgy 커뮤니티가 이렇게 따뜻합니다. 무엇 하나 바라는 것 없이 헌신하며 선뜻 선행을 베푸는 Web 3.0 커뮤니티를 보신 적이 있나요? AL님의 선행은 여기서 멈추지 않습니다. 한국에서 저와 약간의 친분이 있는 Sook이라는 여성 Pudgy 가족이 있어요. 이분은 Pudgy Korea를 맡아서 한국에서 활동하는 분입니다. 저도 작년에 Sook이 운영하는 Pudgy 자선 행사에 가서 기부에 동참한 적이 있는데... 이때 AL은 Pudgy Korea와 Sook이 주최하는 자선 행사에 기부하기도 했어요. 이런 선행은 널리 알려져야 한다고 생각합니다!

너무 칭찬만 했나요? AL은 제가 아는 것보다 훨씬 예전부터 Pudgy 커뮤니티를 지킨 OG 유저이기도 합니다. 1000일 넘게 NFT를 가지고 있어야 할 SBT를 가지고 있기 때문에 제가 잘 알아요. 지금은 저와 함께 Abstract를 든든하게 지탱하는 Giga Chad이기도 하답니다?

실제로 X 피드에 가서 보면 앱스트랙트 생태계에서 어떤 일이 벌어지고 있는지 구체적으로 알 수 있어요. 저는 좀 제가 하고 싶은 것만 하는 스타일이라면, AL은 사람들과 잘 어울려서 문화를 적극적으로 주도한달까요?

그와 함께 Abstract, 그리고 Pudgy의 일원이라는 사실이 참 기뻐요!"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Something incredibly grateful happened last night! I had put in an offer on a 'Fugz First Edition Hoodie' on Abstract's collection platform, DYLI, and then forgot about it lol.

But yesterday, after seeing I had purchased a Fugz NFT, AL said, "Oh, I saw you bought Fugz and that you wanted the hoodie! So I'll gift it to you!" and then, very coolly, transferred the hoodie NFT to me! I immediately had it shipped to my home. I was truly touched.

This is how warm the Pudgy community is. Have you ever seen a Web 3.0 community that dedicates itself and performs good deeds selflessly? AL's good deeds don't stop here. There's a fellow Pudgy family member named Sook, a woman I have a slight acquaintance with in Korea. She manages Pudgy Korea and is active in Korea. Last year, I also participated in a Pudgy charity event run by Sook and made a donation... At that time, AL also donated to the charity event hosted by Pudgy Korea and Sook. I believe such good deeds should be widely known!

Have I praised them too much? AL is also an OG user who has protected the Pudgy community long before I knew them. I know this well because they hold an SBT that requires holding an NFT for over 1000 days. And now, they are a Giga Chad who strongly supports Abstract alongside me?

If you actually go to their X feed, you can specifically see what's happening in the Abstract ecosystem. While I tend to do what I want, AL is good at interacting with people and actively leads the culture.

I am truly happy to be a part of Abstract and Pudgy alongside them!

data.author: 0xFaDd3C023e295FDBA31fc2b57770029318960beD
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata: {"description":"그는 놀라운 활동량과 정보력으로 한국 앱스트랙트에서 대체 불가한 존재로 자리잡았습니다.\n\n그가 한국 앱스트랙트에서 가지는 영향력은 누구나 인정할겁니다. 항상 좋은 정보들을 빠르게 커뮤니티에 전파시키는 한편, 다른 다양한 커뮤니티와도 끊임없이 교류합니다. KBW에서 실제로 그를 보았고, 그는 현실에서도 너무 훌륭하고 좋은 사람이었습니다. 그가 있어서 행복하고 앞으로도 계속 그가 한국 커뮤니티들을 이끌어 주길 바랍니다. 항상 도움받고있습니다."}

translation.translatedDescription:
With his incredible activity and information, he has established himself as an irreplaceable figure in the Korean Abstract community.

Everyone will acknowledge the influence he holds within the Korean Abstract community. He consistently disseminates valuable information quickly to the community while also constantly interacting with various other communities. I actually saw him at KBW, and he was a truly wonderful and kind person in person. I am happy to have him, and I hope he continues to lead the Korean communities. I am always receiving help from him.

data.author: 0xeA43D9d2b85a363d8e760F936b05978B853F24c4
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000

translation.translatedDescription: Red is super well-known as core community member on Green chain. His Giga chad badge says it more then any of my words. Been like a balm for my ears to hear his thoughts about getting Giga Chad role, that never focus on it personally, he is using all advantages on portal, like streaming, trading, gaming, collecting

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Pavil 씨가 Pudgy 커뮤니티에서 MVP인 걸 아시나요? 매주 커뮤니티에서 회원들의 눈에 띄는 펭귄들이 추천받는 명예의 전당이 있는데, 거기에 본인의 Pudgy NFT를 올린 친구예요. 그만큼 커뮤니티에 진심이라는 소리입니다.

이 친구는 스트릿 아티스트인데 마음이 참 따뜻해요. 펏지 커뮤니티의 일원에게 어떤 일이 생기면 그날을 기억한 후, 특별한 이벤트가 있는 사람의 펏지 NFT로 거리에 그림을 그리고 커뮤니티에 자랑합니다. 사람들이 다들 좋아해요.

그림 그리는 게 난이도가 높고 힘든 과정인데, 꾸준히 지금까지 예술을 하는 게 멋있어요. 언젠가는 저의 펏지 펭귄 그림도 그려주면 정말 좋을 것 같아요.

Abstract에서 방송하면서 그림 그리는 걸 라이브 스트림하고, 펏지 파티 같은 IP를 활용한 게임도 빠르게 소개하며, SBT 발행 소식, 실제 Pudgy가 들어간 실물 장난감 및 제품 언박싱 등등을 팔로업하면 Pudgy 커뮤니티에서 어떤 일이 벌어지는지 알 수 있습니다.

MOST VALUABLE PENGUIN, 즉 MVP라 불릴 만합니다. 저와 친구가 되어주어 고마워요!"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Did you know that Pavil is the MVP in the Pudgy community? Every week, there's a hall of fame where penguins who stand out to the community members are recommended, and he's a friend who posted his Pudgy NFT there. That's how sincere he is to the community.

He's a street artist with a very warm heart. If something happens to a member of the Pudgy community, he remembers that day and then draws a picture on the street with the Pudgy NFT of the person who has a special event and shows it off to the community. People all love it.

Drawing is a difficult and challenging process, but it's great that he's been consistently doing art until now. I hope he draws my Pudgy penguin someday.

By live-streaming his drawing on Abstract, quickly introducing games that utilize IPs like Pudgy Party, following up on SBT issuance news, and unboxing real toys and products with Pudgy in them, you can find out what's happening in the Pudgy community.

He deserves to be called the MOST VALUABLE PENGUIN, or MVP. Thank you for being my friend!

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "저는 Karina🌸님 덕분에 Abstract에서 여성이 GigaChad 역할을 받으면 Abstract Angel을 받는다는 것을 처음 알았어요. 한국에서도 카리나님 같은 분이 나오길 바랍니다.

카리나님은 Abstract와 한 몸처럼 움직입니다. 저와는 다르게 유행을 굉장히 빠르게 캐치하시고, 잘 따라가십니다.

저는 좀 둔감한 편이라 잘 못 따라가서 예전에 하던 게임을 자주 하는 반면.. 카리나님은 Abstract에서 밀어주거나 새롭게 올라오면 즉시 플레이하고 트렌디하게 소식을 X 피드에 업데이트해 주셔서 저도 소식을 빠르게 받고, 다른 유저분들도 좋아합니다.

이는 Pudgy 생태계에도 예외는 아니에요. 펏지 펭귄과 Kast와의 협업이 있을 때도, 밸런타인데이 기념 인형이 나왔을 때도 너무 귀여운 그림으로 잘 표현해 주셔서 정말 잘 봤습니다.

Abstract Portal에서 생방송도 자주 하시는데 가끔 찾아가서 보기도 해요. 본인만 방송하고 딱 끄는 게 아니고, 한국 방에 와서 같이 웃고 떠들면서 노니까 한국의 Abstract 유저들도 다들 좋아해요."
}

translation.translatedDescription:
I learned for the first time thanks to Karina🌸 that in Abstract, if a woman gets the role of GigaChad, she gets Abstract Angel. I hope someone like Karina comes out in Korea too.

Karina moves as one with Abstract. Unlike me, she catches trends very quickly and follows them well.

I'm a bit insensitive, so I can't keep up, so I often play games I used to play... On the other hand, when Abstract pushes or new things come up, Karina immediately plays and updates the news on her X feed in a trendy way, so I get the news quickly, and other users like it too.

This is no exception in the Pudgy ecosystem. When there was a collaboration between Pudgy Penguins and Kast, and when Valentine's Day dolls came out, she expressed them so well with cute drawings that I really enjoyed them.

She also often does live broadcasts on Abstract Portal, and I sometimes go and watch them. She doesn't just broadcast and turn it off, but she comes to the Korean room and laughs and chats with us, so Korean Abstract users all like her.

data.author: 0x2Ba7586e93E256ECdE946DfFa5847447474f08E3
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "First off, huge respect to one of the most proactive contributors in the Abstract ecosystem.

Kang is hands down the most enthusiastic international friend I've met in crypto. I’ve never had anyone support me like this before.

Why he stands out:

High Agency: He never waits for instructions. If he sees a gap, he fills it himself. As a Diamond Tier user, he actually uses the tools we build. His feedback on Abslysis has been invaluable for tracking the ecosystem's health.

A Builder’s Ally: As devs, we often stay behind the scenes and can easily be overlooked. But ever since I met Kang, he has championed my work non-stop, offering massive support and encouragement to keep me going.

Humble Giga Chad: Despite grinding massive XP weekly and holding high status, he never looks down on anyone. He is generous, approachable, and helps everyone in the community with patience.

He bridges the KR, CN, and Global communities effortlessly while keeping the "WAGMI" energy high as a Mod for AbstractKorea.

If you want the real pulse of the Abstract ecosystem, watching his moves is your best Alpha. A true holder and a developer's best friend. 💎🐧",
  "source": "Ethos Everywhere Wallet",
  "version": "1.0",
  "client": "web"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
First off, huge respect to one of the most proactive contributors in the Abstract ecosystem.

Kang is hands down the most enthusiastic international friend I've met in crypto. I’ve never had anyone support me like this before.

Why he stands out:

High Agency: He never waits for instructions. If he sees a gap, he fills it himself. As a Diamond Tier user, he actually uses the tools we build. His feedback on Abslysis has been invaluable for tracking the ecosystem's health.

A Builder’s Ally: As devs, we often stay behind the scenes and can easily be overlooked. But ever since I met Kang, he has championed my work non-stop, offering massive support and encouragement to keep me going.

Humble Giga Chad: Despite grinding massive XP weekly and holding high status, he never looks down on anyone. He is generous, approachable, and helps everyone in the community with patience.

He bridges the KR, CN, and Global communities effortlessly while keeping the "WAGMI" energy high as a Mod for AbstractKorea.

If you want the real pulse of the Abstract ecosystem, watching his moves is your best Alpha. A true holder and a developer's best friend. 💎🐧

data.author: 0x4d2b8676f52575354140436BD55b8E61F448D8a7
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "처음 그를 알게 된 것은 ABSLYSIS 통계 사이트를 보다가 이것을 개발한 사람이 dalaoge인 걸 알았을 때였습니다.

ABSLYSIS 사이트는 Abstract를 하는 사람이면 궁금해할 만한 통계를 제공해 주는데 Tier 분포도, 배지 보유자 현황, X 배너 모음 등등 다양한 정보를 제공해 준답니다.

사람들이 저에게 "너는 어떻게 그걸 아는 거야?"라고 했을 때... 사람들이 생각보다 많이 몰라서 저는 이 사이트를 소개한 기억이 납니다. 실제로 많은 Abstract 유저들에게 호응도 얻었죠. 이런 좋은 정보는 많은 사람들이 알아야 한다고 생각합니다.

그리고 그 당시 ABSLYSIS에는 X를 장식할 배너가 없어서 제가 몇십 개를 만들어서 줬는데 dalaoge가 빠르게 업데이트해서 지금은 많이 풍족해졌어요! Abstract中文游戏公会의 계정 배너도 제가 만든 것을 사용하니 저도 보람을 느껴요.

dalaoge는 제가 도와준 걸 보고, 중국 커뮤니티 분들이 많이 쓰는 채팅 어플 WeChat으로 초대해 줬어요. 많이 감동받았습니다.

가만 보면 중국 분들은 능력자분들이 진짜 많아서 실제로 기가버스 게임을 할 때도 도움을 많이 받았네요.

재미있는 사실 : dalaoge는 나와 함께 Abstract의 Giga Chad에 승급한 동기이다.",
  "source": "Ethos Everywhere Wallet",
  "version": "1.0",
  "client": "web"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
I first learned about him when I was browsing the ABSLYSIS statistics site and realized that dalaoge was the one who developed it.

The ABSLYSIS site provides statistics that anyone doing Abstract would be curious about, including Tier distribution, badge holder status, X banner collections, and more.

When people asked me, "How do you know that?"... I remember introducing this site because many people didn't know about it. It actually received a lot of positive responses from Abstract users. I think many people should know about this good information.

And at the time, ABSLYSIS didn't have any banners to decorate X, so I made dozens and gave them to dalaoge, who quickly updated them, and now there are plenty! I also feel proud that the Abstract中文游戏公会's account banner uses the one I made.

Dalaoge saw that I helped him and invited me to WeChat, a chat app that many people in the Chinese community use. I was very touched.

Looking at it, there are so many talented people in China, and I actually received a lot of help when playing Gigabverse games.

Fun fact: dalaoge is a peer who was promoted to Giga Chad in Abstract with me.

translation.translatedDescription:
Berry is a committed and respected contributor within the Pengu and Abstract community. He consistently engages in discussions, provides thoughtful input, and supports others in a constructive way. His contributions are practical and add real value to the ecosystem.

As a Lil Pudgy holder, Berry demonstrates long-term conviction and alignment with the project’s vision. He is focused, dependable, and contributes with intent rather than noise.

translation.translatedDescription: Broski is the absolute goat. He was one of the first to really push Abstract streaming to the next level. We’ve been part of the Abstract community since the very first days, and it’s been awesome watching him grow so much and become such a respected voice. Huge fan, massive respect.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0x0e3274FEa64567fdA14187c89B08f61048F4d45a
data.metadata: {"description":"Abschud is a bit like Leonidas in 300, the first Spartan soldier of Abstract. The Green Lantern. He watches over the essentials and oils the gears of the ecosystem. He brings things to light when needed and sends reminders when necessary.\nHe’s sort of the voice of reason among the Chads on Abstract. Patient and meticulous, he also enforces the rules while making sure to preserve a healthy atmosphere and good vibes."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Abschud is a bit like Leonidas in 300, the first Spartan soldier of Abstract. The Green Lantern. He watches over the essentials and oils the gears of the ecosystem. He brings things to light when needed and sends reminders when necessary.
He’s sort of the voice of reason among the Chads on Abstract. Patient and meticulous, he also enforces the rules while making sure to preserve a healthy atmosphere and good vibes.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD

data.metadata:
{"description":"A reference in Discord security.
If you want to build a community, it necessarily starts with a SAFE Discord, and Jon is your guy.
He has secured most of the major Web3 Discords or audited their security.
A true well of knowledge in the field."}

translation.translatedDescription:
A reference in Discord security.
If you want to build a community, it necessarily starts with a SAFE Discord, and Jon is your guy.
He has secured most of the major Web3 Discords or audited their security.
A true well of knowledge in the field.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0xCCB0e7366CDfBFD471110ff02632F0542ed0283f
data.metadata: {"description":"When I think of Marcelo, I naturally think of Real Madrid’s number 12. And there’s a small resemblance between the two. Both have skills, different ones, of course but Marcello is an excellent content creator and streamer. You always have a great time watching him; he perfectly reflects Abstract’s good vibes. And I don’t think he’s invited everywhere for no reason… He knows how to create a great atmosphere just as well as he knows how to be serious and highlight projects. He has the ability to stay true to himself while adapting to his audience. A man of quality, He’s a real reference within Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription: When I think of Marcelo, I naturally think of Real Madrid’s number 12. And there’s a small resemblance between the two. Both have skills, different ones, of course but Marcello is an excellent content creator and streamer. You always have a great time watching him; he perfectly reflects Abstract’s good vibes. And I don’t think he’s invited everywhere for no reason… He knows how to create a great atmosphere just as well as he knows how to be serious and highlight projects. He has the ability to stay true to himself while adapting to his audience. A man of quality, He’s a real reference within Abstract.

translation.translatedDescription: Karina is an amazing creator and content strategist with a strong presence. She is approachable and communicative, always working closely with her community and responding thoughtfully to chat interactions. Her openness for Web3 inspire those around her, and her supportive style contributes to a vibrant, uplifting ecosystem. Her streams are always popular and friendly, known for their positive, welcoming energy.

translation.translatedDescription: I was feeling a bit stuck in my own web3 bubble and wanted to join some new groups  that’s how I ended up discovering the Gorilla community through your group. I’m really glad I got to know them!
